hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | grep -qE '(src/engine/|server/)' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: You modified a file in src/engine/ or server/. If you changed game logic, API routes, DB schema, or formulas, update the corresponding CLAUDE.md (src/engine/CLAUDE.md or server/CLAUDE.md) to reflect your changes."}}' || true
